requirement_topic.en: Cybersecurity and Data Protection — IoT / Connected Devices
requirement_topic.zh: 网络安全与数据保护 — 物联网/联网设备
requirement_topic.zht: 網絡安全與數據保護 — 物聯網/聯網裝置

summary.en: Samoa does not currently have a comprehensive standalone cybersecurity law or IoT security standard equivalent to the EU Cyber Resilience Act or UK PSTI Act. However, connected wireless devices and IoT equipment supplied in Samoa must comply with the Computer Crimes Act 2013 (Samoa), which covers unauthorised access and data interference obligations that affect device and network security design. The Personal Data Protection Act 2013 (Samoa) imposes obligations on entities that collect, process, or transmit personal data of Samoa residents, which may apply to IoT device manufacturers and their local importers where devices process personal data. OCC may, as part of the type approval process, require disclosure of network security features for telecom terminal equipment. Samoan law in this area is evolving; Chinese exporters of IoT devices should monitor developments and adopt baseline security practices (unique default credentials, firmware update capability, disclosed data flows) to reduce risk.
summary.zh: 萨摩亚目前尚无等同于欧盟《网络弹性法》或英国PSTI法案的综合网络安全法律或物联网安全标准。但在萨摩亚供应的联网无线设备及物联网设备须遵守《2013年计算机犯罪法》（萨摩亚），该法涵盖影响设备和网络安全设计的未授权访问及数据干扰义务。《2013年个人数据保护法》（萨摩亚）对收集、处理或传输萨摩亚居民个人数据的实体提出义务要求，可能适用于设备处理个人数据的物联网设备制造商及其本地进口商。OCC在型号认证过程中，可能要求披露电信终端设备的网络安全特性。该领域萨摩亚法律仍在发展中；中国物联网设备出口商应持续关注相关动态，并采纳基准安全实践（唯一默认凭据、固件更新能力、数据流披露）以降低风险。
summary.zht: 薩摩亞目前尚無等同於歐盟《網絡彈性法》或英國PSTI法案的綜合網絡安全法律或物聯網安全標準。但在薩摩亞供應的聯網無線設備及物聯網設備須遵守《2013年電腦犯罪法》（薩摩亞），該法涵蓋影響設備和網絡安全設計的未授權訪問及數據干擾義務。《2013年個人數據保護法》（薩摩亞）對收集、處理或傳輸薩摩亞居民個人數據的實體提出義務要求，可能適用於設備處理個人數據的物聯網設備製造商及其本地進口商。OCC在型號認證過程中，可能要求披露電信終端設備的網絡安全特性。該領域薩摩亞法律仍在發展中；中國物聯網設備出口商應持續關注相關動態，並採納基準安全實踐（唯一默認憑據、韌體更新能力、數據流披露）以降低風險。

standards_or_laws: Computer Crimes Act 2013 (Samoa) — covers unauthorised access, data interference, and network security obligations affecting connected device design
Personal Data Protection Act 2013 (Samoa) — data protection obligations for entities processing personal data of Samoa residents
ETSI EN 303 645 — international baseline IoT cybersecurity standard (may be referenced by OCC or SAME as best practice; not yet formally mandated in Samoa)
Communications Act 2016 (Samoa) — OCC authority to impose technical conditions on type-approved telecom terminal equipment, potentially including security disclosures

summary.en: In China, cybersecurity obligations for connected devices are governed by the Cybersecurity Law 2017 (CSL), the Data Security Law 2021 (DSL), the Personal Information Protection Law 2021 (PIPL), and MIIT IoT security standards including GB/T 36951 and related standards. IoT devices processing personal data require security assessments under PIPL. SRRC type approval and MIIT NAL submissions do not include specific IoT cybersecurity disclosures equivalent to what Samoa or international markets may require. Chinese cybersecurity certifications (such as MLPS / Classified Protection) are domestic-only and not recognised by OCC or SAME.
summary.zh: 在中国，联网设备的网络安全义务受《2017年网络安全法》（CSL）、《2021年数据安全法》（DSL）、《2021年个人信息保护法》（PIPL）及MIIT物联网安全标准（包括GB/T 36951等相关标准）约束。处理个人数据的物联网设备须依据PIPL进行安全评估。SRRC型号认证及MIIT NAL申请不包含等同于萨摩亚或国际市场要求的物联网网络安全披露内容。中国网络安全认证（如MLPS/等级保护）仅适用于国内，不被OCC或SAME认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，聯網設備的網絡安全義務受《2017年網絡安全法》（CSL）、《2021年數據安全法》（DSL）、《2021年個人信息保護法》（PIPL）及MIIT物聯網安全標準（包括GB/T 36951等相關標準）約束。處理個人數據的物聯網設備須依據PIPL進行安全評估。SRRC型號認證及MIIT NAL申請不包含等同於薩摩亞或國際市場要求的物聯網網絡安全披露內容。中國網絡安全認證（如MLPS/等級保護）僅適用於國內，不被OCC或SAME認可。

standards_or_laws: Cybersecurity Law 2017 (China, CSL) — network and data security obligations for connected devices
Personal Information Protection Law 2021 (China, PIPL) — personal data protection obligations for IoT devices
GB/T 36951 — Chinese IoT security standard for information security techniques
MLPS / Classified Protection (China) — domestic cybersecurity certification framework, not recognised internationally

gap.en: Samoa does not yet have a mandatory IoT cybersecurity certification scheme equivalent to the EU Cyber Resilience Act. However, exporters of connected wireless devices to Samoa should: (1) comply with the Computer Crimes Act 2013 and Personal Data Protection Act 2013 obligations applicable to their devices; (2) adopt baseline IoT security practices (ETSI EN 303 645 or equivalent) as OCC may reference these as best practice conditions for type approval; (3) ensure that data flows from devices deployed in Samoa that process personal data of Samoa residents are disclosed and handled in accordance with Samoan data protection law. Chinese MLPS cybersecurity certifications are not recognised in Samoa. As Samoan IoT security regulation is evolving, Chinese exporters should monitor OCC and SAME regulatory developments.
gap.zh: 萨摩亚尚未建立等同于欧盟《网络弹性法》的强制物联网网络安全认证机制。但向萨摩亚出口联网无线设备的企业应：(1) 遵守适用于其设备的《2013年计算机犯罪法》及《2013年个人数据保护法》义务；(2) 采纳基准物联网安全实践（ETSI EN 303 645或等效标准），因OCC可能将其作为型号认证的最佳实践条件；(3) 确保在萨摩亚部署的设备处理萨摩亚居民个人数据时，相关数据流已披露并依照萨摩亚数据保护法律进行处理。中国MLPS网络安全认证在萨摩亚不被认可。鉴于萨摩亚物联网安全法规仍在发展中，中国出口商应持续关注OCC及SAME的监管动态。
gap.zht: 薩摩亞尚未建立等同於歐盟《網絡彈性法》的強制物聯網網絡安全認證機制。但向薩摩亞出口聯網無線設備的企業應：(1) 遵守適用於其設備的《2013年電腦犯罪法》及《2013年個人數據保護法》義務；(2) 採納基準物聯網安全實踐（ETSI EN 303 645或等效標準），因OCC可能將其作為型號認證的最佳實踐條件；(3) 確保在薩摩亞部署的設備處理薩摩亞居民個人數據時，相關數據流已披露並依照薩摩亞數據保護法律進行處理。中國MLPS網絡安全認證在薩摩亞不被認可。鑑於薩摩亞物聯網安全法規仍在發展中，中國出口商應持續關注OCC及SAME的監管動態。

mandatory_status.target: Partially mandatory — Computer Crimes Act 2013 and Personal Data Protection Act 2013 obligations apply; no standalone mandatory IoT cybersecurity certification scheme currently in force in Samoa; OCC may impose security disclosure conditions as part of type approval
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Cybersecurity Law 2017, PIPL 2021, and MIIT IoT security standards apply to connected devices in China; MLPS certification mandatory for certain network infrastructure

source.publisher: Office of the Communications Commissioner, Samoa (OCC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Samoa does not currently mandate a standalone IoT cybersecurity certification. However, exporters of connected wireless devices must comply with the Computer Crimes Act 2013 and Personal Data Protection Act 2013 where devices process personal data of Samoa residents. Adopting ETSI EN 303 645 baseline IoT security practices is recommended as OCC may reference these as type approval conditions. Chinese MLPS certifications are not recognised in Samoa. Samoan IoT security regulation is evolving and should be monitored.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 萨摩亚目前未强制要求独立的物联网网络安全认证。但联网无线设备出口商在设备处理萨摩亚居民个人数据时，须遵守《2013年计算机犯罪法》及《2013年个人数据保护法》。建议采纳ETSI EN 303 645基准物联网安全实践，因OCC可能将其作为型号认证条件。中国MLPS认证在萨摩亚不被认可。萨摩亚物联网安全法规仍在发展中，应持续关注。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 薩摩亞目前未強制要求獨立的物聯網網絡安全認證。但聯網無線設備出口商在設備處理薩摩亞居民個人數據時，須遵守《2013年電腦犯罪法》及《2013年個人數據保護法》。建議採納ETSI EN 303 645基準物聯網安全實踐，因OCC可能將其作為型號認證條件。中國MLPS認證在薩摩亞不被認可。薩摩亞物聯網安全法規仍在發展中，應持續關注。
